manifest_name.message: Ahrefs SEO Toolbar: On-Page and SERP Tools

manifest_description.message: Save hours with a complete toolkit in one SEO extension. Insights for on-page, keyword research, and link analysis on any webpage.

shared__open_in.description: The button used to open selected item in another app, service, etc

sign_up__content.descriptions: Full sentence: Sign up or check our free SEO tools

sign_up__link.descriptions: Full sentence: Sign up or check our free SEO tools

sign_in__long.description: Uses on Serp and Content toolbar

web_vitals__info_main.message: Core Web Vitals are speed metrics that are part of Google's Page Experience signals used to measure user experience. This data is based on the real Chrome users' experience with your page. CWV is a minor ranking factor for Google.

web_vitals__not_found.message: Core Web Vitals use the data from real Chrome users. If one or all metrics are not available for the page, this means there's not enough data about the users' experience with this page. In this case, some other tools, including Google's Pagespeed Insights, will show CWV metrics for the homepage instead.

web_vitals__lcp.message: Largest Contentful Paint (LCP) is the single largest visible element loaded in the viewport. Usually a featured image or H1. Measured in seconds.

web_vitals__cls.message: Cumulative Layout Shift (CLS) measures how elements move around or how stable the page layout is. It takes into account the size of the content and the distance it moves.

web_vitals__inp.message: Interaction to Next Paint (INP) assesses responsiveness of a page. It observes the latency of all user interactions with the page, and reports a single value which all (or nearly all) interactions were below. A low INP means the page was consistently able to respond quickly to all-or the vast majority-of user interactions.

raw_vs_rendered.description: Button on popup content. Raw HTML- server-returned source. Rendered HTML- final DOM.

title__too_short.message: The title may be too short. The page title is a crucial element that Google relies on to comprehend pages. Short titles may miss the opportunity to convey the main idea of a page to Google effectively.

title__too_long.message: The title may be too long. Lengthy page titles risk being truncated when presented in Google search results. The recommended maximum title length is ~60 characters.

description__too_short.message: The meta description may be too short. It is recommended to write longer descriptions as they provide an explanation of the page's content to Google.

description__too_long.message: The meta description may be too long. It is advisable to maintain your meta descriptions within approximately 160 characters. Lengthier descriptions risk being truncated on SERPs if Google opts to display them as snippet text.

in_html_code.description: Means that the information is analyzed directly within the client-side rendered HTML code of the page

in_raw_html_code.description: Means that the information is analyzed directly within the server-returned source

validate_sd__placegolder.message: Validate structured data on this page

outgoing_links__dropdown_description.message: Send up to 10 most recent URLs from the list to Ahrefs

ua__warning_body.message: Disable custom user agent when you no longer need it.

settings__bottom.description: Location of the toolbar on the screen

settings__exlude_list_warn.message: Enter domains, URLs, or URL paths where you don't want the Toolbar to show up.

settings__exlude_list_warn_2.message: Use * for URL paths, e.g. https://ahrefs.com/blog/*

search_tools__tip_body.message: Use this button to simulate local search

search_tools__highlight_placeholder.message: Enter the domains that you want to be highlighted in the search results.

$SHORTCUT_POPUP$ to open on-page reports and settings
You can change these key bindings in your

modal__shortcuts_button_settings.description: The button used to open the browser settings e.g. chrome://extensions/shortcuts

modal__blocklist_description.message:
Do you want to disable the Toolbar with metrics for this website or page?
(You can edit the blocklist in the settings)

modal__blocklist_btn_positive_page.description: Button label in a modal that asks the user 'Do you want to disable the Toolbar with metrics for this website or page?'

modal__blocklist_btn_positive_domain.description: Button label in a modal that asks the user 'Do you want to disable the Toolbar with metrics for this website or page?'

modal__blocklist_btn_negative.description: Button label in a modal that asks the user 'Do you want to disable the Toolbar with metrics for this website or page?'

icon_tip__hide_toolbar.message:
Permanently hide the Toolbar on this website, page, or path. 
(You can edit the blocklist in the settings)

icon_tip__add.message:
Save this URL to the list.
To access the saved URLs, click on the extension's icon and navigate to the 'Saved' tab.
The ten most recent URLs from the list can be quickly sent to Link Intersect or Content Gap tools in Ahrefs (for paid users only)

icon_tip__present_in_list.message:
The URL is on the list of saved URLs and can be sent to Link Intersect or Content Gap.
To access the saved URLs, click on the extension's icon and navigate to the 'Saved' tab.
The ten most recent URLs from the list can be quickly sent to Link Intersect or Content Gap tools in Ahrefs.

icon_tip__present.message:
The URL is on the list of saved URLs.
To access the saved URLs, click on the extension's icon and navigate to the 'Saved' tab.
The ten most recent URLs from the list can be quickly sent to Link Intersect or Content Gap tools in Ahrefs.

metrics__sign_up_free_description.message: Get free access to DR, AR and UR with AWT account.

metrics__rp_description.message: The total number of unique web pages linking to the target.

metrics__bl_description.message: The total number of links from other websites pointing to your target.

metrics__kw_description.message: The total number of unique keywords that the target ranks for in the top 100 organic search results across all countries in our database.

metrics__rd_description.message: The total number of unique domains linking to the target.

metrics__st_description.message: The estimated number of monthly visits that the target gets from organic search.

metrics__ur_description.message: URL Rating (UR) shows the strength of the target page's backlink profile on a 100-point logarithmic scale.

metrics__tv_description.message: The monthly cost equivalent of organic search traffic for a website or web page, calculated based on the assumption that the same amount of traffic was obtained through pay-per-click (PPC) advertising instead of organic search rankings.

metrics__w_description.message: The number of words on a web page as seen by Ahrefs' crawler in the page's code. This number may slightly differ from what you see in the browser when you open the page.

metrics__ar_description.message: Represents the strength of the website's backlink profile compared to other websites in our database, with rank #1 being the strongest.

metrics__dr_description.message: Represents the strength of the website's backlink profile on a 100-point logarithmic scale.

metrics__paid_keywords_description.message: The total number of keywords that your target ranks for in paid search results.

metrics__paid_traffic_description.message: The estimated number of monthly visits that your target gets from paid search.

metrics__ads_description.message: The total number of unique ads of a target website or URL in paid search results.

metrics__cost_description.message: The estimated cost of your target's monthly paid search traffic.

kw_metrics__kd_description.message: Estimates how hard it would be to rank in the top 10 organic search results for a keyword on a 100-point scale.

kw_metrics__sw_description.message: An estimation of the average monthly number of searches for a keyword in a given country.

kw_metrics__gv_description.message: An estimation of the average monthly number of searches for a keyword across all countries in our database.

kw_metrics__tp_description.message: Shows the sum of organic search traffic that the #1 ranking page for the target keyword receives from all the keywords that it ranks for.

kw_metrics__c_description.message: An estimation of the number of clicks that people make on the search results for a given keyword per month. Some searches result in no clicks, while others generate multiple clicks on SERPs.

kw_metrics__cpc_description.message: The estimated average price that advertisers pay for each ad click in paid search results for a keyword.

serp__tip_conf.message: Click the extension icon to configure

feedback__positive_answ.message: Great! Please tell us what you like.

starter__q.message: Get access to Ahrefs metrics with our Starter plan for just $PRICE$/month.

error__fetching_data.message: Error fetching data. Please try again later.

error__inactive.message: Your user status in the connected workspace is currently "Inactive."

error__monthly_limit.message: The monthly limit for your workspace has been reached.

error__usage_limit_body.message: To continue, please $UPGRADE_BUTTON$ or wait until your limit resets.

error__usage_limit_body_button.description: The button used as the placeholder in error__usage_limit_body
